full_text:
Cheng Pu (Demou) 程普 (德謀)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Pu (程普), styledDemou (德謀), was born in Tuying, Youbeiping (Presently Fengrun in Hebei Province). Served three generations of the Sun family. From Tuyin in Youbeiping. Cheng Pu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Cheng Pu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
